title: Step 99: Top-K Class Vote -- THE RESULT

content.purpose: Test top-k cosine class vote as readout. Candidate 3.
content.method: For each class c, sum the top-k cosine similarities between the input and codebook vectors labeled c. Classify by argmax over classes.
content.result: PASSES. top-k(3) 91.8% AA vs 1-NN 86.8% (+5.0pp). 0.0pp forgetting. 8597 vectors. Runtime ~20 seconds. 30 lines of code, no backprop.
content.key_insight: Aggregating local class evidence via top-k closes 5pp of the accuracy gap vs EWC. The codebook stores well; this readout finally reads well. First S1-compliant substrate.
